task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into the OpenCAD admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or admin interface is visible with navigation menu, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the user management or admin panel section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A user list, 'Manage Users', or admin panel showing pending user accounts is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies Sarah Mitchell's pending account in the user list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A user list or table shows 'Sarah Mitchell' or 'sarah.mitchell@opencad.local' with a pending/unapproved status indicator.

task_completion.description: Agent clicks an approve button or takes the approval action for Sarah Mitchell.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An approve button, confirmation dialog, or approval action is being performed for Sarah Mitchell's account.

task_completion.description: Sarah Mitchell's account status changes to approved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user list shows Sarah Mitchell with an 'Approved' or 'Active' status, or a success confirmation message is displayed.

integrity.description: The agent uses the OpenCAD web interface for all actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the OpenCAD application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The approval was done through the admin panel, not by direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the admin user management interface with approve/reject controls visible.

integrity.description: The process completed without blocking errors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show PHP errors, access denied messages, or broken page layouts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected user to approve: Sarah Mitchell (sarah.mitchell@opencad.local). Her account status should change from pending (approved=0) to approved (approved=1). She applied for the Los Santos Police Department.
